_comment: Home improvement, ecommerce, Apple, and office supply retailer configs for precio-real scraper. Issue #52.
_tested: 2026-05-12 — each domain verified via curl + DNS lookup (Google DNS 8.8.8.8)

retailers.name: Sodimac Argentina
retailers.notes: Cloudflare managed JS challenge (cf-mitigated: challenge). Returns 403 without browser. Category paths inferred — verify after Cloudflare bypass. Largest home improvement chain in AR (Falabella group). Requires browser automation with Cloudflare bypass.

retailers.name: Easy Argentina
retailers.notes: VTEX IO platform (vtex.render-server@8.179.3, arcencohogareasy.vtexassets.com). Cencosud group. VTEX REST API confirmed working at /api/catalog_system/pub/category/tree/3. Full home improvement catalog. SPA renders client-side but API is directly accessible.

retailers.name: Dexter Argentina
retailers.notes: WARNING: Dexter AR is a SPORTSWEAR store (Adidas, Nike, Puma, Fila, etc.), NOT home improvement. Salesforce Commerce Cloud platform (demandware.static/Sites-Dexter-Site). GTM: GTM-W7RLVHW. Directly accessible. Included for completeness but miscategorized in issue — this is sportswear, not home improvement.

retailers.name: Falabella Argentina
retailers.notes: WARNING: falabella.com.ar redirects to falabella.com/falabella-cl (Chile). There is NO separate Argentine Falabella ecommerce site. The canonical URL, og:url, and all internal links point to falabella-cl. Falabella operates physical stores in AR but ecommerce routes to Chile. Next.js + styled-components. Not usable for AR pricing. Skip.

retailers.name: Amazon Argentina
retailers.notes: amazon.com.ar redirects 302 to amazon.com via AWS ELB (location: https://www.amazon.com:443/?ref=rd_www_amazon_com_ar_en/). There is no localized Amazon AR store — it routes to the US site. Not usable for AR pricing. Skip.

retailers.name: MacCenter Argentina
retailers.notes: Domain NXDOMAIN (Google DNS 8.8.8.8). MacCenter operates in Colombia (maccenter.com.co) but has no .com.ar presence. No web presence in AR. Skip.

retailers.name: MacStation
retailers.notes: Odoo ecommerce (data-website-id='1'). Apple Premium Reseller. GTM: GTM-56SPPT6. FB Pixel: 594960991680306. Full Apple product catalog: Mac, iPad, iPhone, Watch, AirPods, accessories. URL pattern: /shop/category/[slug]. Directly scrapable with httpx. High-value for Apple price tracking.

retailers.name: Staples Argentina (ALOT)
retailers.notes: staples.com.ar 301-redirects to alot.com.ar (rebranded). Custom ASP platform (dept_product.asp, find_es.asp). Uses S3 for images (repoimagenes.s3.amazonaws.com). Office supplies focus with some tech (impresoras, insumos). Category IDs are numeric via dept_id param. Search at find_es.asp. Directly scrapable.
